## Summary

## Tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Required tests pass for every affected repository.
- [ ] Commits include DCO sign-off (`git commit -s`).
- [ ] No `.env`, private keys, tokens, bootstrap payloads, APKs, `worker-state/`, or `orch-state/` are committed.
- [ ] Public PR text does not include real domains, IPs, SNI values, tokens, keys, or deployment infrastructure details.
- [ ] Example AWG dialects or `CAMOUFLAGE_DOMAIN` values are not presented as production defaults.
- [ ] Security-sensitive changes were reviewed for minisign, APK signature, Noise pinning, enroll-token, and docker.sock impacts where relevant.
